title: WITHDRAWN: Plasmodium falciparum stomatin-like protein forms a putative complex with a metalloprotease in distinct mitochondrial loci
author_string: Verhoef, J. M. J., Bekkering, E. T., Boshoven, C., Hannon, M., Proellochs, N. et al.
abstract: Withdrawal statementThis manuscript has been withdrawn owing to a duplicate posting of manuscript number BIORXIV/2024/604071. This was a technical error for which the authors are not responsible, and this DOI for the work should not be cited as reference. The record is retained here for purposes of transparency. If you have any questions, please contact the corresponding author. The correct preprint can be found at doi: 10.1101/2024.07.18.604071
